description: Improve procurement lead quality by resolving paywalled or aggregator-discovered bids to canonical public sources such as SAM.gov when possible, preserving alternate URLs, and downranking/rejecting poor-fit notices like sole-source or vendor-directed renewals.

comments.text: Implemented best-effort SAM.gov canonical-source resolution for BidNet hits, added sole-source/vendor-directed rejection scoring, preserved aggregator provenance in bid metadata, and rejected the existing dev ICCP BidNet lead after SAM.gov review. Focused tests pass with PORT=4102 PHX_SERVER=false.

title: Resolve procurement leads to canonical public sources
